overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a futuristic urban environment. The player ascends stairs, traverses a semi-covered commercial plaza with large digital billboards, crosses an elevated yellow-railed walkway, descends to a lower alley, and enters a neon-lit bar. The sequence features bright midday sunlight transitioning to artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway leading to upper plaza

events.description: ascending from street level toward the plaza above

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs with red railings, following a character in red clothing

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign with blue and red neon lettering
wide concrete stairs with red metal handrails on the left side
red painted metal handrail running alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a wide concrete staircase in an urban environment. The player follows a character in red clothing upward, passing a neon 'CHARIS' sign on the left. The stairs lead toward a sunlit plaza visible at the top, with harsh midday shadows cast across the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-covered commercial plaza with digital advertising

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the open plaza area under the overpass
slight turn to the left while following the character through the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza following the character in red, passing by digital billboards and vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit leading the way through the commercial plaza

massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
small food vendor kiosk with a yellow canopy and red trim

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a semi-covered urban plaza bathed in midday sunlight filtering through overhead structures. Large digital billboards line the right side while the character in red walks ahead toward the far end of the plaza. The environment features concrete paving, support pillars, and small vendor stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with yellow railings connecting building levels

events.description: turning left to ascend the yellow-railed ramp walkway
reaching the top of the ramp and beginning descent down stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up a ramp with distinctive yellow railings, crossing an elevated bridge, then descending stairs on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead on the elevated walkway

entered.detail: elevated walkway with bright yellow safety railings on both sides
pair of illuminated purple vending machines against the wall
red brick building facade with teal-colored window shutters

segments.scene_description: The player turns left onto an elevated walkway characterized by bright yellow railings. After ascending the ramp and crossing the bridge, the character descends a set of stairs on the far side. The walkway passes between buildings, with purple vending machines visible against a brick wall with teal windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with construction barriers and street art

events.description: reaching the bottom of the stairs into the lower alley district
turning toward the bar entrance on the left side of the alley

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alleyway with construction debris, approaching the entrance to a bar

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking along the brick wall

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off a construction area
large painted mural of a skull on a brick wall
doorway with red awning and illuminated menu board leading into the bar

segments.scene_description: Descending into a lower urban alley, the player navigates past construction barriers and a large skull mural on the right. The alley is shaded by surrounding buildings. The character approaches a bar entrance marked by a red awning and illuminated signage, with other pedestrians visible along the narrow walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon lighting and digital screens

events.description: entering the bar from the street, transitioning from natural to artificial light
interior neon lighting becomes dominant as the door closes behind

agents.ego_description: entering the dimly lit bar and walking toward the counter, passing seated patrons

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the green-lit counter
patron sitting in a booth near the entrance

entered.detail: curved bar counter illuminated with green neon underlighting and red stools
multiple suspended digital screens displaying advertisements and sports
red neon sign with 'CHARIS' lettering above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The player enters the bar, transitioning from bright daylight to a dimly lit interior dominated by green and red neon lighting. The space features a curved bar counter with red stools, multiple hanging digital screens, and a prominent 'CHARIS' neon sign. Patrons are seated at tables and the bar as the player moves deeper into the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, futuristic urban district that gradually descends into a dimly lit, neon-soaked interior. It begins at the base of a wide concrete staircase, following a character in red upward past a neon sign and through harsh midday shadows toward a sunlit plaza. As the camera emerges into the open, it traverses a semi-covered commercial space lined with digital billboards and vendor stalls before turning onto an elevated walkway with bright yellow railings. The scene then shifts downward, descending from the bridge into a shaded alleyway past construction barriers and a large skull mural toward a red-awninged entrance. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold of a bar, transitioning from the daylight into a dark atmosphere dominated by green and red neon lights, curved counters, and hanging digital screens.
